definitions.known_reference_semantics: The outer variable is one regularization coefficient. Each evaluation solves the fixed two-coefficient nonnegative ridge regression; local residual checks do not establish a global bilevel optimum or a constraint qualification.
definitions.name_en: Bilevel regularization selection with an inner nonnegative regression
definitions.name_ja: 非負inner回帰を持つbilevel正則化選択

definitions.known_reference_semantics: Small instances can be exhaustively certified; larger instances may use best-known bounds.
The Pareto set and its objective-space image are available analytically.
The active circular boundary and KKT conditions give an exact reference.
The optimizer is not given a reference; the hidden truth is only for educational rendering.
The fixed relaxed-mode sequence is a failure ledger for detecting chattering. It is not a known optimal schedule, contact model, or physical simulation.
definitions.name_en: Hybrid trajectory lesson with relaxed mode discovery
definitions.name_ja: relaxed mode discoveryを持つhybrid軌道教材

definitions.known_reference_semantics: A finite assignment instance has a certifiable exact optimum.
The canonical unshifted test instance has a known exact global minimizer.
The noiseless synthetic data are generated from the recorded three-parameter truth; this reference is for teaching and validation, not optimizer input.
The nonnegative absolute-value terms identify an exact minimizer.
The fixed mesh is an educational transcription; continuous-time feasibility and optimality require mesh refinement and trajectory reconstruction.
definitions.name_ja: 離散化された最適制御問題

definitions.known_reference_semantics: The deterministic teaching reference is the best point on the declared 0.05 capped-simplex grid for the eight fixed training scenarios; it is not a population optimum or future-return guarantee.
Positive-definite instances have one exact global minimizer.
The standard instance has an exact global minimizer at the all-ones vector.
The educational instance uses a reduced deterministic state proxy. Its parameter optimum is not a guarantee for a continuous PDE, a refined mesh, or a different shape representation.
definitions.name_en: Shape optimization on a parameterized domain
definitions.name_ja: parameter化された領域の形状最適化

definitions.known_reference_semantics: The fixed noiseless target rotation has zero chordal loss; it is a teaching reference, not a general rotation-averaging certificate.
The educational instance has no exact global reference; the rendered fields are deterministic teaching outputs on a discretized model.
definitions.name_ja: 構造トポロジー最適化

instances.limitations_en: A low-dimensional convex piecewise-linear example, not a general nonsmooth nonconvex problem.
instances.limitations_ja: 低次元の凸piecewise-linear例で、一般の非滑らか非凸問題ではありません。

instances.limitations_en: A small dense cost matrix without forbidden edges or rectangular assignment.
instances.limitations_ja: 小さなdense cost matrixで、禁止辺やrectangular assignmentを含みません。

constraints.expression: stationarity, primal feasibility, and complementarity residuals <= 1e-8

instances.limitations_en: A deterministic educational instance with one outer variable and two inner coefficients; it does not establish global bilevel optimality, an MPEC stationarity class, a constraint qualification, or general active-set behavior.
instances.limitations_ja: 1つのouter変数と2係数の決定的な教育用instanceです。global bilevel最適性、MPEC stationarity class、constraint qualification、一般のactive-set変更を保証しません。
instances.name_ja: 2係数非負回帰のbilevel正則化教材

instances.limitations_en: A four-item educational instance, not a large-scale MIP benchmark.
instances.limitations_ja: 4品目の教育用instanceで、大規模MIP性能を表しません。

instances.limitations_en: A convex analytic bi-objective lesson without disconnected Pareto fronts.
instances.limitations_ja: 凸で解析的な2目的教材で、disconnected Pareto frontを表しません。
instances.name_ja: 競合する2つの二次目的

instances.limitations_en: A two-dimensional lesson with one convex feasible set.
instances.limitations_ja: 単一の凸feasible setを持つ2次元教材です。
instances.name_ja: 円内制約付き二次関数

constraints.expression: minimum upper-lower wall gap > 0.4 and no self-intersection
educational minimum cell-quality proxy >= 0.2 and inverted_cells = 0
one connected inlet and one connected outlet remain

display.expression: min (r-1.45)²+0.4c²+0.2s²+0.05(r-1)² subject to valid fixed-topology geometry, mesh-quality, and reduced-state checks

instances.limitations_en: A lesson with a three-parameter wall and a low-cost deterministic state proxy; it does not establish CFD, boundary-layer or turbulence behavior, continuous-domain feasibility, mesh-independent objectives, real diffuser performance, or a global optimum.
instances.limitations_ja: 3 parameterの壁面と低costな決定論的state proxyを使う教材です。CFD、境界層、乱流、連続体の可行性、mesh-independentな目的値、実diffuser性能、global optimumを保証しません。

instances.limitations_en: A three-parameter lesson on 20 noiseless synthetic observations; it does not represent real-data identifiability, outliers, error models, or scaling.
instances.limitations_ja: 20点・noiseなしの合成dataを使う3 parameter教材です。実dataの識別性、外れ値、誤差model、scaleを代表しません。

constraints.expression: z_k in [0,1] represents the relaxed share of mode 1
fixed teaching defect ledger is checked separately from mode switching

display.expression: fixed relaxed two-mode teaching ledger with mode sequence 0,1,0,1,0,1,0,1

instances.limitations_en: A fixed synthetic mode-sequence failure lesson; it is not a hybrid solver execution, contact/friction model, physical simulation, or established feasible trajectory.
instances.limitations_ja: 固定した合成mode sequenceのfailure教材です。hybrid solver execution、contact/friction model、物理simulation、可行なtrajectoryを表しません。

display.expression: min ∫(‖state‖²+0.01‖control‖²)dt with ẋ=v, v̇=u and terminal target [1,0]

instances.limitations_en: A fixed 20-interval educational instance; it does not establish continuous-time feasibility or optimality, physical actuator safety, or solver-family performance differences.
instances.limitations_ja: 20区間の固定meshによる教育用instanceです。連続時間の可行性・最適性、制御入力の実機安全性、solver family間の性能差を保証しません。
instances.name_en: EC020 trajectory and control for a second-order system
instances.name_ja: EC020 二次系の軌道・制御

instances.limitations_en: A deterministic two-second, 20-node pendulum lesson. Feasibility at nodes or collocation points does not establish between-point or continuous-time feasibility, hardware safety, model validity, global optimality, or solver-family performance.
instances.limitations_ja: 2秒・20 nodeの決定的な教育用pendulum instanceです。node／collocation pointの可行性は区間内や連続時間の可行性を保証せず、実機の安全性、model妥当性、大域最適性、solver family間の性能差も示しません。

instances.limitations_en: A teaching instance with eight fixed training scenarios, four fixed held-out scenarios, and a 0.05 grid; it provides no population-risk, confidence-interval, future-return, chance-constraint, robust-feasibility, or DRO guarantee.
instances.limitations_ja: 固定training 8件・held-out 4件と0.05 gridの教育用instanceです。母集団risk、confidence interval、将来return、chance constraint、robust feasibility、DRO guaranteeを表しません。
instances.name_en: Four-asset CVaR allocation with eight training and four held-out scenarios

instances.limitations_en: A two-dimensional unconstrained positive-definite educational instance.
instances.limitations_ja: 2次元・無制約・正定値の教育用instanceです。

instances.limitations_en: The standard unshifted two-dimensional test function.
A noiseless fixed-three-correspondence lesson with a fixed step; it does not represent outliers, multi-rotation graphs, quaternion signs, runtime, or a general convergence radius.
instances.limitations_ja: 固定3対応・noiseなし・固定stepの教材です。外れ値、複数rotationのgraph、quaternion sign、実装速度、一般的な収束半径を表しません。
instances.name_en: Fixed three-correspondence attitude alignment to a near-pi target
instances.name_ja: near-pi targetへの固定3対応attitude alignment

instances.limitations_en: A deterministic 8x4 educational instance for following the FEM state equation, filtering, projection, and OC/MMA roles; it does not establish real-design strength, buckling, manufacturability, continuous-model guarantees, or general performance.
instances.limitations_ja: 8×4要素の決定的な教育用instanceです。FEM方程式、filter、projection、OC/MMAの役割を追うためのreferenceであり、実設計の強度・座屈・製造性・連続体の保証や一般性能を示しません。

instances.limitations_en: The hidden truth is only rendered for teaching and is not supplied to the optimizer as a known optimum.
instances.limitations_ja: hidden truthは教材表示だけに使い、optimizerへ既知最適解として渡しません。

instances.limitations_en: A fixed-condition-number 2D lesson, not a general performance ranking.
instances.limitations_ja: 固定condition numberの2次元教育用instanceで、一般性能を順位付けしません。

instances.limitations_en: Only the standard two-dimensional coefficients are represented.
instances.limitations_ja: 2次元の標準係数だけを扱います。
